params.name: Behistun Inscription
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Dec 6, 552 BC, Darius the Great carved the cliffs of the Behistun village to mark his achievements.

Darius I built the world's first great empire across Asia, Europe, and Africa. To praise himself, he ordered people to carve his achievements in different Babylonian dialects on the cliff. This was known as the Behistun Inscription. It also included his image of standing upright, holding the bow with his left hand, and pointing his right finger to the sky.
